original_prompt:
A 4x4 icon contact sheet with FULLY TRANSPARENT BACKGROUND (PNG alpha channel, no background color at all — icons float on checkerboard transparency). 16 flat minimalist geometric icons for 'Wodouyao', a dark-mode desktop terminal app, arranged in a clean grid with NO dividers and NO fill between cells. Each icon is 128px centered in its cell. Tokyo Night palette: accent blue #7aa2f7, green #9ece6a, orange #ff9e64, pink #f7768e, purple #bb9af7, cyan #7dcfff, off-white #c0caf5. Icons from left-to-right, top-to-bottom (no text labels):
Row 1: (1) 'W' monogram logo in blue rounded square, (2) arrow cursor pointer in white, (3) dashed rectangle outline in white, (4) two small dots connected by a curved bezier line in white.
Row 2: (5) stylized asterisk star in orange, (6) hex diamond shape in green, (7) outlined cyan diamond, (8) white terminal block cursor rectangle.
Row 3: (9) solid green dot with pulse ring, (10) gray circle with X, (11) lightning bolt in yellow, (12) two vertical pause bars in purple.
Row 4: (13) three dots with parallax motion streaks in white (starfield), (14) two overlapping sine waves in purple, (15) three simplified figure silhouettes grouped in white (teams), (16) gear cog with six teeth in white.
Consistent thin 2px strokes, flat vector style. CRITICAL: background must be 100% transparent (alpha=0), only the icon shapes have color. No labels, no captions, no grid lines, no background fill.
